power.method: DC 12V / AC 24V / PoE Class 3 (IEEE 802.3af); 8.5 W (DC), 8.5 W (AC), 8.5 W (PoE)

features: smart dual light: IR 30m + white LED 30m

built-in analytics: People Detection, Vehicle Detection, Object Line Crossing Detection, Object Enter Area Detection, Object Exit Area Detection, Intrusion Detection (Forbidden Area Detection), Tampering Detection, Temperature Detection, ...
audio: 2-way, Mic-in, Line-in, Line-out (no built-in mic/speaker)
detection range: detection: people 404m; vehicle 1239m, recognition: people 101m; vehicle 310m, identification: people 50m; vehicle 155m, (people: 1.8 x 0.5m), (vehicle: 1.4 x 4.0m)
ONVIF confirmed, but no Network Protocol & Service / RTSP row on official spec sheet -- protocols left unconfirmed
